title: WhyNeedWater
description:
A Minecraft plugin that makes tridents not need water to fly with.

The plugin is in beta idk if it is gonna always work

Might make it open source soon
body:
This plugin for PaperMC (might work for bukkit and spigot, idk) makes Tridents with Riptide not need water or rain so you can fly


How to use
Step 1: Get trident
Step 2: Get riptide 1 2 or 3
Step 3: Fly
